ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company they work for */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role held by the executive */,
  "total_pay" REAL /* Total compensation pay of the executive */,
  "cash_pay" REAL /* Cash compensation pay */,
  "equity_pay" REAL /* Equity compensation pay */,
  "other_pay" REAL /* Other forms of compensation */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "stock_awards" REAL /* Stock awards value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of compensation data */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change compared to the previous year */,
  "industry_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of CEO pay to average industry worker pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executives_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES executive_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry_averages ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES industry_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_types" (
  "compensation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the compensation type (e.g., Cash, Equity, Other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compensation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_averages" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "average_worker_pay" REAL /* Average pay of a worker in the industry */,
  "average_ceo_pay" REAL /* Average pay of a CEO in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive whose data is changing */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., promotion, raise) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value after the change */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_changes_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., CEO, CFO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive whose data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Tech, Finance) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_pay_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive related to this trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "total_pay_trend" REAL /* Total pay trend over the years */,
  "cash_pay_trend" REAL /* Cash pay trend over the years */,
  "equity_pay_trend" REAL /* Equity pay trend over the years */,
  "bonus_trend" REAL /* Bonus pay trend over the years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_pay_trends_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_perfomance" (
  "perfomance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perfomance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_perfomance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_employment_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_employment_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the executive */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the executive studied */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_education_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executive */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company where the executive worked */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the executive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_experience_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)
